basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Scientist, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.post_name: Research Scientist, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) Research Scientist, Lab Technician and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website pgimer.edu.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the PGIMER Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Coordinator and Research Scientist, Max 28 years for Lab Technician
age_limit.details: Project Coordinator: Maximum 35 years Research Scientist: Maximum 35 years Lab Technician: Maximum 28 years

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Life Sciences or Healthcare Management, MSc Life Sciences, B.Sc/M.Sc MLT
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: PhD in Life Sciences or Healthcare Management with at least 2 year's experience in clinical/translational research project coordination. Research Scientist: MSc Life Sciences with at least 2 year's experience. Lab Technician: B.Sc/M.Sc MLT

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PGIMER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the PGIMER recruitment is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the PGIMER recruitment. These positions are for Project Coordinator, Research Scientist, and Lab Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Project Coordinator position, candidates must possess a PhD in Life Sciences or Healthcare Management, along with at least 2 years of experience in clinical/translational research project coordination.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Lab Technician post is 28 years. For Project Coordinator and Research Scientist roles, the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Research Scientist position is Rs 67,200. The salary ranges for other posts are Rs 79,166 for Project Coordinator and Rs 21,600 for Lab Technician.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these PGIMER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these PGIMER posts will primarily involve an interview for shortlisted candidates. Further details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, offline applications will not be accepted. Candidates are required to apply online only through the provided link or the official PGIMER website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are project-based, temporary/ad-hoc posts for a privately funded project at PGIMER, Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee mentioned for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official PGIMER website.
